name: Stripe Payments
description: Connects to Stripe Payments to sync events, customers, charges, subscriptions, invoices, and more into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Secret API Key
install_fields.help: Your Stripe secret API key. Find it in the Stripe Dashboard under Developers → API keys.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the API key by calling GET /v1/account and establish the connector.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /v1/account and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Events
methods.description: Full or incremental sync of Stripe events into the knowledge base.

methods.name: Get Balance
methods.description: Retrieve the current Stripe account balance.

methods.name: List Customers
methods.description: Paginated list of Stripe customers with optional filters.

methods.name: Get Customer
methods.description: Retrieve a single customer by ID.

methods.name: Create Customer
methods.description: Create a new Stripe customer.

methods.name: Update Customer
methods.description: Update an existing customer's attributes.

methods.name: Delete Customer
methods.description: Permanently delete a Stripe customer.

methods.name: List Charges
methods.description: Paginated list of charges.

methods.name: Get Charge
methods.description: Retrieve a single charge by ID.

methods.name: List Payment Intents
methods.description: Paginated list of payment intents.

methods.name: Get Payment Intent
methods.description: Retrieve a single payment intent by ID.

methods.name: Create Payment Intent
methods.description: Create a new payment intent with amount and currency.

methods.name: List Subscriptions
methods.description: Paginated list of subscriptions, optionally filtered by customer.

methods.name: Get Subscription
methods.description: Retrieve a single subscription by ID.

methods.name: Cancel Subscription
methods.description: Cancel a subscription immediately.

methods.name: List Products
methods.description: Paginated list of Stripe products.

methods.name: List Invoices
methods.description: Paginated list of invoices.

methods.name: Create Refund
methods.description: Create a full or partial refund for a charge.

methods.name: List Events
methods.description: Paginated list of events, filterable by type and date range.

methods.name: Get Event
methods.description: Retrieve a single event by ID.

methods.name: List Webhook Endpoints
methods.description: List all registered webhook endpoints.

methods.name: Create Webhook Endpoint
methods.description: Register a new webhook endpoint with enabled event types.

methods.name: Delete Webhook Endpoint
methods.description: Delete a webhook endpoint by ID.
